quests.title: Deliver Gundren's Wagon
quests.description: The party was hired to escort a wagon of supplies to Barthen's Provisions in Phandalin. Simple job. Except Gundren and Sildar have disappeared.

objectives.text: Deliver the wagon to Barthen's Provisions in Phandalin
Find out what happened to Gundren and Sildar

quests.title: Rescue Gundren Rockseeker
quests.description: Gundren has been captured by the Cragmaw goblins and taken to Cragmaw Castle on the Black Spider's orders. He has a map to Wave Echo Cave — the lost mine of the Phandelver's Pact.

objectives.text: Recover the map to Wave Echo Cave

quests.title: Drive Out the Redbrands
quests.description: The Redbrand Ruffians have been terrorizing Phandalin. They operate from Tresendar Manor under the command of a mysterious figure called Glasstaff. The town is too afraid to act.

objectives.text: Free any prisoners held in the manor

quests.title: Wave Echo Cave
quests.description: The lost mine of the Phandelver's Pact, containing the Forge of Spells — a location of immense magical power. The Black Spider wants it. Gundren's brothers Nundro and Tharden are somewhere inside.

quests.title: The Shattered Obelisk
quests.description: Strange goblin activity around Zorzula's Rest points to a deeper threat — mind flayers using a transformed goblin called Ruxithid to gather obelisk fragments. If they succeed, they open a rift to the Far Realm.

objectives.text: Stop the mind flayers from reassembling the obelisk
